tasks.label: Build Extension
tasks.detail: Compile VS Code extension extension.ts → out/extension.js

tasks.label: Build Web App
tasks.detail: Build yuleasr-web for VS Code embedding and copy to media/webview/

tasks.label: Build All (Ext + Webview)
tasks.command: cd apps/yuleasr-vscode && pnpm build && pnpm build:webview
tasks.detail: Build both the extension and the webview app bundle

tasks.label: Start Web Dev Server
tasks.detail: Start Vite dev server on port 3000 for the web app
